hero.title: Kumaon Fest 2025
hero.description: Experience the vibrant culture of Kumaon through music, art, literature, and traditional performances. Join us in celebrating the rich heritage of Uttarakhand's hill region.

about.title: About Kumaon Fest
about.description: Kumaon Fest is an event which comprises literature fest , dj and live event for supporting a cause of sahara to provide aid to the strays around and initiatives of Taameer artivist foundation to bring positivity and equality.Kumaon fest believes in showcasing local talents.
about.subDescription: Set against the backdrop of the beautiful Himalayan foothills in Haldwani, the festival creates a unique space where traditional Kumaoni culture meets contemporary artistic expression. It's more than just an event—it's a movement to preserve, promote, and pass on our cultural identity to future generations.

events.title: Festival Highlights
events.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the diverse cultural experiences that make Kumaon Fest unique

highlights.title: Music Concerts
highlights.description: Traditional Kumaoni folk music, contemporary fusion, and classical performances by renowned artists.

highlights.title: Art Exhibitions
highlights.description: Showcase of traditional Kumaoni art, contemporary paintings, sculptures, and handicrafts.

highlights.title: Literature Sessions
highlights.description: Poetry readings, book launches, and discussions with prominent Kumaoni and Hindi authors.

highlights.title: Cultural Performances
highlights.description: Traditional dance forms, theater performances, and storytelling sessions celebrating our heritage.

schedule.title: Festival Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Three days packed with cultural experiences and artistic celebrations

gallery.title: Past Editions
gallery.subtitle: Relive the magical moments from previous Kumaon Fest celebrations

images.caption: Grand opening ceremony with traditional welcome
Local artists performing traditional Kumaoni songs
Contemporary art exhibition showcasing local talent
Traditional dance performance by local groups
Intimate poetry reading session with renowned authors

community.title: Join Our Community
community.description: Kumaon Fest thrives on community participation. We believe that culture is best celebrated when everyone comes together to share, learn, and create memories.

opportunities.title: Volunteer Opportunities
opportunities.description: Help us organize and run the festival

opportunities.title: Artist Participation
opportunities.description: Showcase your talent on our platform

tickets.title: Don't Miss Kumaon Fest 2025
tickets.subtitle: Secure your spot at the most anticipated cultural celebration of the year. Early bird tickets are now available!

relatedEvents.title: Haldwani Heritage Walk
relatedEvents.description: Explore the historical landmarks and cultural heritage of Haldwani city.

relatedEvents.title: Mountain Photography Workshop
relatedEvents.description: Learn landscape photography techniques in the beautiful Kumaon hills.

relatedEvents.title: Folk Dance Competition
relatedEvents.description: Showcase traditional Kumaoni dance forms in this exciting competition.

relatedEvents.title: Local Cuisine Festival
relatedEvents.description: Taste authentic Kumaoni dishes prepared by local chefs and home cooks.

relatedEvents.title: Winter Storytelling Night
relatedEvents.description: Listen to traditional Kumaoni folk tales around a cozy bonfire.

featuredEvents.title: Traditional Folk Music Concert
featuredEvents.description: Experience the soulful melodies of Kumaoni folk songs performed by renowned local artists.

featuredEvents.title: Contemporary Art Exhibition
featuredEvents.description: Discover modern interpretations of traditional Kumaoni themes by emerging artists.

featuredEvents.title: Poetry & Literature Session
featuredEvents.description: Join celebrated poets and authors for readings and discussions about Kumaoni literature.

featuredEvents.title: Traditional Dance Performance
featuredEvents.description: Watch mesmerizing performances of classical Kumaoni dance forms.

featuredEvents.title: Handicraft Workshop
featuredEvents.description: Learn traditional Kumaoni crafts from master artisans in hands-on sessions.
